overview: I built a full AI eval pipeline for my SAFe Feature Spec System: SQLite storage, a 6-case golden set, A/B prompt testing, a 5-tab Streamlit dashboard, and a Claude-powered improvement suggester. Key finds: LLM-as-judge varies ±7pts at temp 0.

keyPoints.title: ±7pt judge variance persists even at temperature 0.0
Bare→boosted PM input spreads reached +25 points
Router v2 fixed intermittent EXPERIENCE misclassification via A/B data
V1 baseline: 5/6 passed, $1.56, routing bug now measurable
Suggester proposes prompt edits; I decide — human-in-the-loop preserved
